generated_oml:
instance RealTimeDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for real-time data collection from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RealTimeDataSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data processed for model updates"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector, Optimizer
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model for structural dimensions using Computer-Aided Design (CAD)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance CyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber model representing control systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SupervisoryController
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation for dynamic analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting system anomalies using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for managing system operations based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services to assess safety and optimal performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAssessment, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation capabilities to reproduce and forecast physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStatePrediction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services using optimizer algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control through supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustPhysicalTwin
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms for identifying system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyInsight
]

instance AnomalyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of system anomalies through fault detection algorithms"
]

instance SystemStatePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of future system states using state estimators"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system performance metrics from optimizer algorithms"
]

instance SafetyAssessment : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of system safety using sensor data"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency based on monitored data"
]

instance AdjustPhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of physical twin parameters based on system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data; system performance is validated by monitors checking safety and optimality criteria."
]
